settings.howToUseMessage:
✈️ Airline Ticket Scanner automatically tracks registration times for your flights and helps you get your boarding pass on time.

📸 1. TICKET SCANNING
Point your phone camera at the ticket. This can be either a regular paper boarding pass or a ticket displayed on the screen of your laptop, tablet, or another phone.
• Tip: Keep the camera steady. A special algorithm automatically focuses the lens and adjusts exposure to eliminate reflections and glare from screens.

🔍 2. AUTOMATIC DATA PROCESSING
After pressing the capture button, the app instantly reads the text from the photo and extracts all key flight details:
• Passenger Name
• Flight Number & Airline
• Departure Date & Time
• Seat & Booking Reference (PNR)
Check the correctness of the recognized details on the results screen and press "Save Ticket". Your data is stored locally on your device with complete privacy.

⏰ 3. REGISTRATION TIME CALCULATION
An extensive database of rules for hundreds of global airlines is built directly into the app. Once a ticket is saved, the system automatically calculates the exact opening time for online check-in (e.g., 24, 30 or 48 hours before departure depending on the airline's rules).

🔔 4. NOTIFICATION & FAST CHECK-IN
Precisely at the second online check-in opens, the app will send you a push notification. Simply tap it to open the ticket card and follow the direct link to the airline's official website to quickly complete your check-in.

🔔 5. PERSONAL REMINDERS
If online check-in opens at night or at an inconvenient time for you, you can set a custom reminder. Tap the "Reminder time" button on the ticket card and choose a hour when it will be comfortable for you to receive the notification (for example, in the morning).
